{{Quote|Tamarack. Used to be a nice neighborhood|[[Elscol Loro]]|<ref name="X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1">[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]]</ref>}}
'''Tamarack''' was a town on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cilpar]] that was attacked and destroyed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

It was home to Cilpar resistance leader [[Elscol Loro]]. Elscol's mother was killed in the attack, and one of the resistances suppliers, [[Gates Harnik]], was captured and hung from a lightpost.

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 1|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 1]] {{1st}}
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 2|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 2]]
